description_long: This is a large, military-grade combat tactical vehicle equipped with a long, cylindrical missile mounted on its chassis. The vehicle features a robust, armored body painted in a dark green color, with a total of eight large, rugged tires designed for heavy-duty terrain. The missile is secured on top of the vehicle, with visible support structures and a pointed nose cone at the front. The cab is positioned at the front, with reinforced windows and a low-profile design for added protection. The rear of the vehicle houses the missile's exhaust and support mechanisms, while the sides are smooth with minimal external attachments. The overall design emphasizes durability, mobility, and the ability to transport and launch large ordnance.
description: A large, green military vehicle with eight heavy-duty tires and a mounted missile on top, featuring an armored cab and robust chassis.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored cab, missile nose cone, and reinforced front bumper.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the missile, eight large tires, and the vehicle's elongated body.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the missile's exhaust, support structures, and the back of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the missile, tires, and smooth armored panels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large missile launcher mounted on the top center of the vehicle; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating visible, especially around the cab and chassis; appears thick and robust with smooth, sloped surfaces.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint scheme; no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large off-road tires with deep tread pattern; appear reinforced for heavy loads.
